createAttachments.description:
Upload attachments for an ATS Position. Each file can be provided either as a URL or base64 encoded content.

Restrictions:
- Maximum 10MB per file and total upload
- Allowed file types: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, JPG, PNG, TXT
- URLs must be publicly accessible HTTPS endpoints
- Private IPs and localhost URLs are blocked for security
- All files must succeed or entire operation fails (transactional)

list.description: This API fetches modified entity ids given a time frame. Maximum duration of a time window is limited to 24 hrs. The supported entity types are 'profiles', 'positions', 'demands', 'users', 'profile-applications', 'profile-tags', 'profile-notes', 'profile-feedbacks', 'planned-events', 'user-campaigns', 'user-messages', 'event-candidate-activities', 'email-delivery-feedbacks', 'user-calendar-events', 'bookings', 'holidays', 'org-units', 'entity-profile-applications'

parameters.name: entityType
parameters.description: Entity type e.g. profiles, positions, users

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Timestamp to indicate time window's start time

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: Timestamp to indicate time window's end time. This value should be at least 30 minutes less than the current time.

listSearch.description: Returns all the matching demands for an employee profile. Only works for employee profiles, not candidates. By default, demands are filtered by the employee's location and a minimum star rating threshold of 3.5. Results are sorted by match score (highest to lowest). Use ignoreLocation=true to search globally and minStarThreshold to adjust the quality threshold.

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: Employee Profile ID (supports both encoded and decoded ID)

parameters.name: filterQuery
parameters.description: Demand Filter Query using predefined filter arguments documented [here](https://apidocs.eightfold.ai/v2.0/docs#the-filterquery-parameter)

parameters.name: applyMarketplaceFilters
parameters.description: When true, applies the same filters used in the Demand Marketplace (Career Hub), including user group access control and configured visibility rules. Default: false

parameters.name: applyMatchedDemandsWidgetFilters
parameters.description: When true, applies the same filters used in the Matched Demands widget on the employee profile page in Resource Management. Default: false

parameters.name: ignoreLocation
parameters.description: When true, ignores the profile's location when matching demands. By default, demands are filtered to match the employee's location. Default: false

parameters.name: minStarThreshold
parameters.description: Minimum star rating threshold (1.0 to 5.0) for matched demands. Only demands with match scores at or above this threshold will be returned. Default: 3.5

list.description: Search demands using query parameters and get the complete demand objects

parameters.description: any wildcard text to search in demand

parameters.description: Include archived demands

listSuccessors.description: Get a list of recommended successors for the specified succession plan given a position ID. The endpoint does not support pagination due to a post-processing step where employee profiles are sorted by the match score. Because of that the results will always return a full list with max number of results as 100. A sample request looks like this, https://apiv2.eightfold.ai/api/v2/careerhub/succession_plans/1234567/recommended_successors, where 1234567 is the position ID of the plan.

parameters.description: Eightfold position ID associated with the succession plan

parameters.description: This specifies list of incumbent profile IDs. If this is given, only plans that have incumbents who match the specified profile IDs are returned. The format should be comma-separated values with or without spaces (ex. 1000,2000, 3000).

parameters.description: Wildcard text used when searching for the results

ext_demand.description: API endpoints for Resource Management External Demand Entity

list.description: Search external demands using query parameters and get the complete external demand objects

parameters.name: filterQuery
parameters.description: Filter query using predefined filter arguments documented [here](https://apidocs.eightfold.ai/v2.0/docs#the-filterquery-parameter)

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: any wildcard text to search in external demand

parameters.name: includeArchived
parameters.description: Include archived demands

booking.description: API endpoints for Resource Management Booking Entity

list.description: Search bookings using query parameters and get the complete booking objects. Atleast one of employeeEmail or demandId is required in filters.

parameters.name: employeeEmail
parameters.description: Filter on employee's email

parameters.name: demandId
parameters.description: Filter on Eightfold demand id

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: The start date of the period for which you want to filter bookings. This parameter accepts an epoch timestamp. Only bookings that end on or after this date will be included in the response.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: The end date of the period for which you want to filter bookings. This parameter accepts an epoch timestamp. Only bookings that start on or before this date will be included in the response.

parameters.name: bookingType
parameters.description: Filter on booking type. Possible values: ['demand', 'leave', 'optional_holiday', 'blocker']

parameters.name: bookingStatus
parameters.description: Filter on booking status. Possible values: ['pending', 'approved', 'rejected']

holiday.description: API endpoints for Resource Management Holiday Entity

list.description: Search holidays using query parameters and get the complete holiday objects.

parameters.name: holidayType
parameters.description: Filter on holiday type. Possible values: ['public_holiday', 'optional_holiday']

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Filter on holiday region

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: The start date of the period for which you want to filter holidays

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: The end date of the period for which you want to filter holidays
